name: Beef and Bean Burrito
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare taco mix according to package directions.
2. Place 3 ounces of Taco Mix and 1/4 cup of refried beans on each flour tortilla.
3. Roll up the tortilla.
4. Pour sauce over burritos and sprinkle with cheddar cheese.
5. Heat in microwave oven for 2 minutes or conventional oven for 10 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit until hot.
